name: Monarch Butterfly
description: Multi-generational magnetic navigation — a 4,800 km migration completed across 4 generations, where no individual butterfly has made the full journey. Time-compensated sun compass integrates circadian clock with antenna-based magnetic sensing. Complete metamorphosis transforms a crawling leaf-eater into a flying navigator through total neural reorganization — yet inherited migration memory persists through the dissolution.

core_attributes.pattern: multi-generational navigation, complete metamorphosis, inherited spatial memory
